documentation.readme: Sniffle is a sniffer for Bluetooth 5 and 4.x (LE) using TI CC1352/CC26x2 hardware.
usage_sections: Support for BT5/4.2 extended length advertisement and data packets
Support for BT5 Channel Selection Algorithms #1 and #2
Support for all BT5 PHY modes (regular 1M, 2M, and coded modes)
Support for sniffing only advertisements and ignoring connections
Support for channel map, connection parameter, and PHY change operations

arguments.description: Relay slave should request a fast connection interval
